meaning: adv.<书>不仅如此,而且n.拒绝,反对,投反对票adv.<古>否,不
examples: Long essays, nay, whole books have been written on this.
The board wants input from members before they all vote yea or nay.
Nay, I have nothing to do there!
His manners nay be faulted, but his timing was less off than many might have hoped.
He is expected to arrive in the remote capital, Nay Pyi Taw, late on Friday.
